title: Deliciously Smoky Algerian Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired lamb dish, perfect for grilling or broiling. Serve with couscous or pita bread for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: 1 1/2 pounds lamb shoulder or neck, cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: You can also use ground lamb if preferred

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing the kebabs during grilling

ingredients.name: 1 large onion, chopped
ingredients.notes: You can also use red onion for a sweeter flavor

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper, to taste
10-12 bamboo skewers, soaked in water for at least 30 minutes

instructions: 1. Preheat your grill or broiler to medium-high heat.
2. In a large bowl, combine the lamb, olive oil, onion, garlic, smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to coat the lamb evenly.
3. Thread the lamb cubes onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
4. Brush the skewers with a little olive oil to prevent sticking.
5. Grill or broil the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
6. Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Serve hot with couscous, pita bread, or your favorite sides.
8. Garnish with fresh cilantro, parsley, or lemon wedges, if desired.
